laws.title: Persons or Private Security Agency not to engage or provide private security guard without licence
laws.description: No person shall carry on or commence the business of private security agency, unless he holds a licence issued under this Act.
laws.simpleExplanation: Engaging in or starting a private security agency business requires a valid licence issued under this Act.

punishments.description: Punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine which may extend to twenty-five thousand rupees, or with both.

relatedSections.description: Defines punishment for contravention of this section

laws.title: Conditions for commencement of operation and engagement of supervisors
laws.description: Every private security agency shall commence activities within six months of obtaining the licence, impart prescribed training, and employ supervisors.
laws.simpleExplanation: Agencies must commence business within six months of getting a licence and ensure adequate training and supervisors.

punishments.description: Punishable with a fine which may extend to twenty-five thousand rupees, in addition to suspension or cancellation of the licence.

relatedSections.description: Defines punishment for contravention of this section

laws.title: Eligibility to be a private security guard
laws.description: Specifies eligibility conditions for employing a person as a private security guard, including citizenship, age, character, and training.
laws.simpleExplanation: Guards must meet certain citizenship, age, and training requirements to be employed.

punishments.description: Punishable with a fine which may extend to twenty-five thousand rupees, in addition to suspension or cancellation of the licence.

relatedSections.description: Defines punishment for contravention of this section

laws.title: Licence to be exhibited
laws.description: Every private security agency shall exhibit its licence or copy thereof in a conspicuous place of its business.
laws.simpleExplanation: Agencies must display their licence or a copy in a prominent place at their business location.

punishments.description: Punishable with a fine which may extend to twenty-five thousand rupees, in addition to suspension or cancellation of the licence.

relatedSections.description: Defines punishment for contravention of this section

laws.title: Penalty for unauthorized use of certain uniforms
laws.description: If any private security guard or supervisor wears the uniform of the Armed Forces or Police or similar dress, they are punishable.
laws.simpleExplanation: Guards and supervisors are not allowed to wear military or police uniforms or similar clothing.

punishments.description: Punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to one year or with fine which may extend to five thousand rupees, or with both.
